nodes.name: Ibera seedeater
nodes.summary: Ibera seedeater（Sporophila iberaensis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Ibera seedeater。

nodes.name: Ibera seedeater
nodes.summary: The Ibera seedeater (Sporophila iberaensis) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae, formerly included within the family of American sparrows (Emberizidae). It is found in the Iberá Wetlands. It was described in 2016. Taxonomy The specific epithet iberaensis refers to the species' main distribution throughout the Iberá Wetlands in the province of Corrientes, Argentina. References
